hooks.command: "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/sync-to-platforms.sh && echo 'Harness Pipeline active. Run: bash scripts/orchestrate.sh "<task>" <module>'
echo 'Reminder: Harness pipeline mandatory for all module tasks. Read requirements.md. Config: .mcp.json (primary) → Kiro/Antigravity (sync)'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == .mcp.json ]] || [[ "$FILE" == .claude/settings* ]]; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/sync-to-platforms.sh; fi; if [[ "$FILE" == modules/* ]] || [[ "$FILE" == skills/* ]]; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/scripts/agents/kairos.sh "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

hooks.prompt: Check if the completed work followed the harness pipeline defined in CLAUDE.md and requirements.md. For module tasks (pptx/docx/wbs/trello/dooray/gdrive/datadog): Was Confidence_Trigger evaluated? Was Planner→Executor→Reviewer pipeline used? Was Reviewer independent from Executor? If any step was skipped for a module task, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "what was missed"}. If all steps were followed or the task didn't require the pipeline, respond with {"ok": true}.
